title: sphaerocephalus spinosus
intro: Sphaerocephalus spinosus, also known as globe thistle, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is also valued for its ability to boost the immune system and reduce fever, making it a popular choice for treating colds and flu. Globe thistle is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be used in herbal remedies such as tinctures and infusions to harness its medicinal benefits.
